news:news.news:title: Meta and YouTube have been found liable in a significant social media addiction trial, potentially affecting numerous similar cases in the US.
news:news.news:keywords: social media addiction lawsuits, US-Iran peace talks, Middle East conflict impact on aviation, UN resolution on slavery, Philippines energy crisis

news:news.news:title: Global stock markets rose on optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages and rising costs persist.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran peace plan impact on global markets, US Postal Service fuel surcharge details, Europe fuel shortage warnings, AI datacenter construction moratorium, Delta Airlines service changes due to funding issues

news:news.news:title: Intel and LG Display may have achieved the best laptop battery life, surpassing competitors like Apple and Qualcomm.
news:news.news:keywords: laptop battery life advancements, Amazon Big Spring Sale deals, Meta layoffs and AI investment, Spotify artist protection features, gaming console price increases

news:news.news:title: The Boston Celtics ended the Oklahoma City Thunder's 12-game winning streak, while various controversies and predictions shape the sports landscape.
news:news.news:keywords: Celtics vs. Thunder game recap, Puka Nacua lawsuit details, MLB season predictions, March Madness Sweet 16 preview, NFL player controversies

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into diabetes treatment, the search for extraterrestrial life, and the behavior of pollinators and memory storage in the brain.
news:news.news:keywords: breakthroughs in diabetes treatment, habitable exoplanets, honey bee behavior, insulin delivery advancements, deep-sea discoveries

news:news.news:title: High oil prices could lead to a global recession, while geopolitical tensions and local political shifts are impacting various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: global economic outlook, Denmark political situation, Iran conflict implications, Australia EU trade agreement, impact of oil prices on economy

news:news.news:title: TSA workers face uncertainty amid a government shutdown, while Delta Airlines suspends special services for Congress members as funding battles continue.
news:news.news:keywords: TSA funding and government shutdown, Delta Airlines Congress service suspension, impact of Iran war on energy prices, prediction markets regulation, effects of corporate jargon on employee performance

news:news.news:title: Meta faces a $375 million penalty for misleading users about product safety, while Apple and NASA announce significant updates and plans for their technologies.
news:news.news:keywords: Meta's legal issues, NASA's lunar base plans, Apple's Siri updates, OpenAI's project discontinuation, Arm's new CPU for AI

news:news.news:title: Hubert Davis was fired as UNC's basketball coach following an early NCAA tournament exit, while other sports news includes significant player contracts and rule changes.
news:news.news:keywords: coaching changes in college basketball, Tiger Woods return to golf, NBA injury updates, NFL player contracts, MLB player contracts

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include advancements in insulin delivery, memory storage, and the behavior of honey bees, alongside significant findings in astronomy and paleontology.
news:news.news:keywords: insulin delivery advancements, honey bee behavior, memory storage in the brain, radiation damage mechanisms, new species discoveries

news:news.news:title: Meta and YouTube Found Liable in Landmark Social Media Addiction Trial, UN Calls it a Crime Against Humanity
